memory_cards.statement: Graph memory systems enable agents to preserve relationships between knowledge elements, not just isolated facts.
Provenance tracking is essential for graph memory systems to maintain trust and traceability of stored knowledge.
Update semantics must be explicitly defined in graph memory systems to handle modifications without losing contextual integrity.

details: Durable memory cards created for graph memory design principles.
Ambiguity preserved in relationships and requirements.
